card.headline: Moderate adherence with several missed days; Blobs appears under-challenging
reasons: Overall adherence is 62% with 5 zero-minute days, suggesting inconsistent home practice.
Blobs shows high performance (~0.80–0.97) with mostly flat difficulty (~0.13–0.14), suggesting under-challenge.

params.text: Check in about barriers on zero-minute days and help set a consistent schedule; consider increasing challenge for Blobs.

params.reason: High performance with flat difficulty suggests the current task may be under-challenging.

items.text: Overall adherence is 62% with 5 zero-minute days, suggesting inconsistent home practice.
Blobs shows high performance (~0.80–0.97) with mostly flat difficulty (~0.13–0.14), suggesting under-challenge.

checkin.wins: Saturday was your strongest day. Balloons AR got tougher, and you stayed right with it—really steady control.
checkin.to_improve: If a day goes quiet, try a quick warm-up round of Hockey AR just to keep the rhythm.
